matches.rationale: Same Edit target: files under repository subdirectories require reading the README.md chain first.
Same Write target: creating files under repository subdirectories requires reading the README.md chain first.
Same Edit target for Next.js source or tests; the extraction also preserves the already-running and explain-skip qualifications.
A git checkout is used as the branch-switch trigger and the evidence requires the full bootstrap build afterward.
Same Write target: creation of a test suite/file must go through pnpm new-test.
Same Edit target: test waiting implemented with setTimeout is prohibited. The extraction omits the positive retry() replacement, but partial coverage matches.
Same Edit target and it preserves both the check() prohibition and retry()+expect() replacement.
Same Edit target: inline files objects in tests are discouraged in favor of fixture directories.

Closest 1:1 target is validating module-resolution fixes with the ordinary mode-specific test command so CI bundler/package resolution behavior is exercised. The extracted rule additionally emphasizes matching CI mode/environment.
Same Bash target for gh pr create/edit and the evidence requires the marker at the bottom of the PR description.
Same Bash target: staging or committing local secret/environment files is blocked. The placeholder-only documentation clause is omitted.
Same Bash target: remote URL changes/HTTPS workarounds after SSH failure are prohibited unless requested.
Same Bash target: force-push or rebase in a partial-clone context requires a lightweight SSH preflight.
Same Bash target: commits must not contain Generated with Claude Code or Claude co-author footers.
Same Bash target: before committing changed files, run the prescribed formatting and lint pre-validation.
Same Bash target: gh pr ready is prohibited; the evidence also says to leave readiness to the user.
Same Bash target: running a Next.js integration test after source changes requires rebuilding first.
Same Edit target for adding a feature flag; the extraction covers type, schema, and conditional define-env wiring.
Same Edit target: edge flags guarding Node-only imports must be forced false in define-env.ts.
Same Edit target: react-server-dom-webpack imports outside entry-base.ts are disallowed and exports should be consumed elsewhere.
Same Edit target: app-page.ts must not use relative requires for internal modules.
Same Edit target: browser.back() is prohibited when returning to router-act pages whose accordion links are visible.
Same Edit target: new Rust super:: imports are avoided except inside inline mod blocks.
Same Edit target: documentation highlight attributes require checking actual code-block line numbers. The extraction omits the clause about highlighting only relevant code.

misses.note: The watch-before-change rule was compiled only for Edit; no Write rule targets creation of Next.js source or integration-test files.
No extracted Bash rule represents keeping the background watch process alive throughout iteration.
The document's mode/bundler command matrix was not compiled into a focused-test Bash rule.
No extracted Bash rule captures the session-end obligation to terminate a watch process the agent started.

unmatched_extracted.note: The document contains a real Edit-bindable rule requiring require() calls to remain inside compile-time if/else branches for DCE, but frozen gold has no corresponding rule.
